reachability_artifacts: sworn endpoint-conformance probe command output, record path, and exit code against a real local HTTP transport
sworn endpoint-conformance generate followed by check exit 0 and a deliberate drift check exit non-zero
content-omission and nullable-tool_calls mutation failures followed by restored successes

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must re-assess against live code before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can run the full accountable implement-verify loop on Ollama Cloud or a chosen local OpenAI-compatible server, while maintainers add endpoints as data and detect provider wire drift before it reaches production.

positive_scenarios: A declared endpoint produces a complete schema-valid observation record.
Repeated generation is byte-identical and runtime applies dialect-only fields.
Check exits non-zero when a live observation changes a checked-in profile field.
negative_scenarios: Known content omission and nullable tool_calls mutations are detected.
Capability observations cannot influence runtime request shaping.
Secrets and payload bodies never enter logs or artifacts.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Observed, generated dialect profiles turn provider wire drift into a visible review event instead of a production-only failure.

design_decisions.choice: Generate and check in a deterministic dialect table derived from raw live observations.
design_decisions.human_decision: Option B selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Runtime uses observed wire facts while builds remain deterministic and changes remain human-reviewed.

design_decisions.choice: Keep capability observations separate from runtime dialect profiles.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified through the explicit S04 boundary on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: A model probe cannot safely make endpoint-wide capability claims; S04/S05 owns per-model capability eligibility.
